name: Krill Oil
summary: Krill Oil is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Inflammation; Metabolic Health; Energy Metabolism. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Inflammatory Signaling Modulation; Metabolic Regulation; Lipid Metabolism Support, not treatment claims.
